globalOptions.name: config-source
globalOptions.summary: Override the configuration source: local, remote

commands.name: assemble
commands.summary: Clone all repositories and build the unified documentation site in one step.
commands.notes:
The assembler clones multiple documentation repositories and builds them into a single unified site
composed by a shared navigation.yml. This command combines assembler config init,
assembler clone, and assembler build into a single invocation.

parameters.name: strict
parameters.summary: Treat warnings as errors.

parameters.name: environment
parameters.summary: Named deployment target, e.g. dev, staging, production. Determines which configuration branch and index names are used.

parameters.name: metadata-only
parameters.summary: Write only metadata files; skip HTML generation. Ignored when --exporters is also set.

parameters.name: show-hints
parameters.summary: Print documentation hints emitted during the build.

parameters.name: exporters
parameters.summary:
Comma-separated list of exporters to run.
            Values: Html, Elasticsearch, Configuration, LinkMetadata, DocumentationState, LLMText, Redirects.
            Default: Html, Configuration, LinkMetadata, DocumentationState, Redirects.

parameters.name: assume-build
parameters.summary: Skip the build step when .artifacts/docs/index.html already exists. Intended for test scenarios only.

parameters.name: fetch-latest
parameters.summary: Fetch the HEAD of each branch instead of the pinned link-registry ref.

parameters.name: assume-cloned
parameters.summary: Skip cloning; assume repositories are already on disk. Useful for iterating on the build.

parameters.name: serve
parameters.summary: Serve the site on port 4000 after a successful build.

parameters.name: log-level
parameters.summary: Minimum log level. Default: information

parameters.name: config-source
parameters.summary: Override the configuration source: local, remote

parameters.name: skip-private-repositories
parameters.summary: Skip cloning private repositories

commands.name: build
commands.summary: Build a single documentation set from source.
commands.notes:
Locates the documentation root by searching for a docset.yml file starting at options .Path.
The output directory is wiped and rebuilt on each run unless incremental build detects no changes.

parameters.name: path
parameters.summary: Root directory of the documentation source. Defaults to cwd/docs.

parameters.name: output
parameters.summary: Destination for generated HTML. Defaults to .artifacts/html.

parameters.name: path-prefix
parameters.summary: URL path prefix prepended to every generated link.

parameters.name: force
parameters.summary: Delete and rebuild the output folder even if nothing changed.

parameters.name: strict
parameters.summary: Treat warnings as errors.

parameters.name: allow-indexing
parameters.summary: Emit meta robots tags that allow search engine indexing.

parameters.name: metadata-only
parameters.summary: Write only metadata files; skip HTML generation. Ignored when --exporters is also set.

parameters.name: exporters
parameters.summary:
Comma-separated list of exporters to run.
            Default: html, configuration, linkmetadata, documentationState, dedirects.

parameters.name: canonical-base-url
parameters.summary: Base URL written into <link rel=canonical> tags.

parameters.name: skip-api
parameters.summary: Skip OpenAPI spec generation for faster builds.

parameters.name: skip-cross-links
parameters.summary: Skip fetching cross-doc-set link indexes.

parameters.name: log-level
parameters.summary: Minimum log level. Default: information

parameters.name: config-source
parameters.summary: Override the configuration source: local, remote

parameters.name: skip-private-repositories
parameters.summary: Skip cloning private repositories

commands.name: diff
commands.summary: Verify every renamed or removed page in the current branch has a redirect entry.
commands.notes:
Compares the git diff of the working branch against the redirect file. Exits 1 if any moved
or deleted page is missing a redirect entry. Run before merging to catch broken links early.

parameters.name: path
parameters.summary: Root of the documentation source. Defaults to cwd/docs.

parameters.name: log-level
parameters.summary: Minimum log level. Default: information

parameters.name: config-source
parameters.summary: Override the configuration source: local, remote

parameters.name: skip-private-repositories
parameters.summary: Skip cloning private repositories

commands.name: format
commands.summary: Fix common formatting issues (irregular spacing, trailing whitespace) across documentation files.
commands.notes: Exactly one of --check or --write must be specified.

parameters.name: path
parameters.summary: Documentation root. Defaults to cwd.

parameters.name: check
parameters.summary: Report files that need formatting without modifying them. Exits 1 when any file is out of format.

parameters.name: write
parameters.summary: Apply formatting changes in place.

parameters.name: log-level
parameters.summary: Minimum log level. Default: information

parameters.name: config-source
parameters.summary: Override the configuration source: local, remote

parameters.name: skip-private-repositories
parameters.summary: Skip cloning private repositories

commands.name: index
commands.summary: Index a single documentation set into Elasticsearch.
commands.notes:
Builds the documentation set in metadata-only mode and streams the output to Elasticsearch.
Does not write HTML to disk. Requires a running cluster and valid credentials.

parameters.name: endpoint
parameters.summary: -es,--endpoint, Elasticsearch endpoint URL. Falls back to env DOCUMENTATION_ELASTIC_URL.

parameters.name: api-key
parameters.summary: API key for authentication. Falls back to env DOCUMENTATION_ELASTIC_APIKEY.

parameters.name: username
parameters.summary: Username for basic authentication. Falls back to env DOCUMENTATION_ELASTIC_USERNAME.

parameters.name: password
parameters.summary: Password for basic authentication. Falls back to env DOCUMENTATION_ELASTIC_PASSWORD.

parameters.name: ai-enrichment
parameters.summary: Enable AI enrichment of documents using LLM-generated metadata (enabled by default).

parameters.name: search-num-threads
parameters.summary: Number of search threads for the inference endpoint.

parameters.name: index-num-threads
parameters.summary: Number of index threads for the inference endpoint.

parameters.name: eis
parameters.summary: Use the Elastic Inference Service to bootstrap the inference endpoint (enabled by default).

parameters.name: bootstrap-timeout
parameters.summary: How long to wait for the inference endpoint to become ready (e.g. 4m, 90s).

parameters.name: force-reindex
parameters.summary: Force a full reindex, discarding any incremental state.

parameters.name: buffer-size
parameters.summary: Number of documents per bulk request.

parameters.name: max-retries
parameters.summary: Number of retry attempts for failed bulk items.

parameters.name: debug-mode
parameters.summary: Log every Elasticsearch request and response body; append ?pretty to all requests.

parameters.name: proxy-address
parameters.summary: Route requests through this proxy URL.

parameters.name: proxy-username
parameters.summary: Proxy server username.

parameters.name: proxy-password
parameters.summary: Proxy server password.

parameters.name: disable-ssl-verification
parameters.summary: Disable SSL certificate validation. Use only in controlled environments.

parameters.name: certificate-fingerprint
parameters.summary: SHA-256 fingerprint of a self-signed server certificate.

parameters.name: certificate-path
parameters.summary: Path to a PEM or DER certificate file for SSL validation.

parameters.name: certificate-not-root
parameters.summary: Set when the certificate is an intermediate CA rather than the root.

parameters.name: log-level
parameters.summary: Minimum log level. Default: information

parameters.name: config-source
parameters.summary: Override the configuration source: local, remote

parameters.name: skip-private-repositories
parameters.summary: Skip cloning private repositories

commands.name: mv
commands.summary: Move a file or folder and rewrite all inbound links across the documentation set.

parameters.name: source
parameters.summary: Source file or folder path.

parameters.name: target
parameters.summary: Destination file or folder path.

parameters.name: dry-run
parameters.summary: Print the changes that would be made without applying them.

parameters.name: path
parameters.summary: Documentation root. Defaults to cwd.

parameters.name: log-level
parameters.summary: Minimum log level. Default: information

parameters.name: config-source
parameters.summary: Override the configuration source: local, remote

parameters.name: skip-private-repositories
parameters.summary: Skip cloning private repositories

commands.name: serve
commands.summary: Serve a documentation folder at http://localhost:3000 with live reload.
commands.notes: File-system changes are reflected without restarting the server.

parameters.name: path
parameters.summary: Documentation source directory. Defaults to the cwd/docs folder.

parameters.name: port
parameters.summary: Port to serve the documentation. Default: 3000

parameters.name: watch
parameters.summary: Special flag for dotnet watch optimizations during development

parameters.name: log-level
parameters.summary: Minimum log level. Default: information

parameters.name: config-source
parameters.summary: Override the configuration source: local, remote

parameters.name: skip-private-repositories
parameters.summary: Skip cloning private repositories

namespaces.summary: Build a unified documentation site by composing multiple documentation sets under a shared navigation.

commands.name: build
commands.summary: Build the unified site from all previously cloned repositories.
commands.notes:
Run after assembler clone. Reads every cloned repository, applies the shared navigation.yml,
and writes the unified site to .artifacts/docs/.

parameters.name: strict
parameters.summary: Treat warnings as errors.

parameters.name: environment
parameters.summary: Named deployment target, e.g. dev, staging, production. Determines which configuration branch and index names are used.

parameters.name: metadata-only
parameters.summary: Write only metadata files; skip HTML generation. Ignored when --exporters is also set.

parameters.name: show-hints
parameters.summary: Print documentation hints emitted during the build.

parameters.name: exporters
parameters.summary:
Comma-separated list of exporters to run.
            Values: Html, Elasticsearch, Configuration, LinkMetadata, DocumentationState, LLMText, Redirects.
            Default: Html, Configuration, LinkMetadata, DocumentationState, Redirects.

parameters.name: assume-build
parameters.summary: Skip the build step when .artifacts/docs/index.html already exists. Intended for test scenarios only.

parameters.name: log-level
parameters.summary: Minimum log level. Default: information

parameters.name: config-source
parameters.summary: Override the configuration source: local, remote

parameters.name: skip-private-repositories
parameters.summary: Skip cloning private repositories

commands.name: clone
commands.summary: Clone all repositories listed in the assembler configuration.
commands.notes:
Run assembler config init first to fetch the repository list. Clones into a local
working directory; subsequent assembler build reads from there.

parameters.name: strict
parameters.summary: Treat warnings as errors.

parameters.name: environment
parameters.summary: Named deployment target. Determines which repositories and branches are cloned.

parameters.name: fetch-latest
parameters.summary: Fetch the HEAD of each branch instead of the pinned link-registry ref.

parameters.name: assume-cloned
parameters.summary: Skip cloning; assume repositories are already on disk.

parameters.name: log-level
parameters.summary: Minimum log level. Default: information

parameters.name: config-source
parameters.summary: Override the configuration source: local, remote

parameters.name: skip-private-repositories
parameters.summary: Skip cloning private repositories

commands.name: index
commands.summary: Index the assembled documentation into Elasticsearch.
commands.notes:
Runs an assembler build with only the Elasticsearch exporter enabled, then streams documents
to the cluster. The index name is derived from the environment name.


Run after assembler build or use instead of it when indexing is the only goal.

parameters.name: endpoint
parameters.summary: -es,--endpoint, Elasticsearch endpoint URL. Falls back to env DOCUMENTATION_ELASTIC_URL.

parameters.name: api-key
parameters.summary: API key for authentication. Falls back to env DOCUMENTATION_ELASTIC_APIKEY.

parameters.name: username
parameters.summary: Username for basic authentication. Falls back to env DOCUMENTATION_ELASTIC_USERNAME.

parameters.name: password
parameters.summary: Password for basic authentication. Falls back to env DOCUMENTATION_ELASTIC_PASSWORD.

parameters.name: ai-enrichment
parameters.summary: Enable AI enrichment of documents using LLM-generated metadata (enabled by default).

parameters.name: search-num-threads
parameters.summary: Number of search threads for the inference endpoint.

parameters.name: index-num-threads
parameters.summary: Number of index threads for the inference endpoint.

parameters.name: eis
parameters.summary: Use the Elastic Inference Service to bootstrap the inference endpoint (enabled by default).

parameters.name: bootstrap-timeout
parameters.summary: How long to wait for the inference endpoint to become ready (e.g. 4m, 90s).

parameters.name: force-reindex
parameters.summary: Force a full reindex, discarding any incremental state.

parameters.name: buffer-size
parameters.summary: Number of documents per bulk request.

parameters.name: max-retries
parameters.summary: Number of retry attempts for failed bulk items.

parameters.name: debug-mode
parameters.summary: Log every Elasticsearch request and response body; append ?pretty to all requests.

parameters.name: proxy-address
parameters.summary: Route requests through this proxy URL.

parameters.name: proxy-username
parameters.summary: Proxy server username.

parameters.name: proxy-password
parameters.summary: Proxy server password.

parameters.name: disable-ssl-verification
parameters.summary: Disable SSL certificate validation. Use only in controlled environments.

parameters.name: certificate-fingerprint
parameters.summary: SHA-256 fingerprint of a self-signed server certificate.

parameters.name: certificate-path
parameters.summary: Path to a PEM or DER certificate file for SSL validation.

parameters.name: certificate-not-root
parameters.summary: Set when the certificate is an intermediate CA rather than the root.

parameters.name: environment
parameters.summary: Named deployment target; becomes part of the Elasticsearch index name.

parameters.name: log-level
parameters.summary: Minimum log level. Default: information

parameters.name: config-source
parameters.summary: Override the configuration source: local, remote

parameters.name: skip-private-repositories
parameters.summary: Skip cloning private repositories

commands.summary: Serve the output of a completed assembler build at http://localhost:4000.
commands.notes: Run after assembler build. Does not watch for file changes.

parameters.name: port
parameters.summary: Port to listen on. Default: 4000.

parameters.name: path

commands.name: sitemap
commands.summary: Generate sitemap.xml using accurate content_last_updated dates from Elasticsearch.
commands.notes:
The sitemap generated by assembler build uses the current date as a placeholder.
Run this command after assembler index to overwrite it with precise last-modified dates
sourced from the search index.

namespaces.summary: Build and query the bloom filter used for legacy-URL redirect coverage.

commands.name: create
commands.summary: Build a bloom filter binary from a local legacy-docs repository.
commands.notes:
The bloom filter is a compact data structure that records which legacy URLs existed before migration.
It is used to verify redirect coverage: if a legacy URL is absent from the filter, any redirect
pointing to it cannot be validated. Run once after cloning the legacy-docs repository.

parameters.name: built-docs-dir
parameters.summary: Path to the local legacy-docs repository checkout.

parameters.name: log-level
parameters.summary: Minimum log level. Default: information

parameters.name: config-source
parameters.summary: Override the configuration source: local, remote

parameters.name: skip-private-repositories
parameters.summary: Skip cloning private repositories

commands.name: lookup
commands.summary: Test whether a URL path is recorded in the bloom filter.

parameters.name: path
parameters.summary: URL path to look up (e.g. /guide/en/elasticsearch/reference/current/index.html).

parameters.name: log-level
parameters.summary: Minimum log level. Default: information

parameters.name: config-source
parameters.summary: Override the configuration source: local, remote

parameters.name: skip-private-repositories
parameters.summary: Skip cloning private repositories

namespaces.summary: Fetch and manage the central assembler configuration repository.

commands.name: init
commands.summary: Fetch the assembler configuration into local application data.
commands.notes:
All assembler and codex commands read their repository list from a central configuration repository.
Run this once before the first assembler clone or assemble invocation, and whenever
the configuration has changed upstream.

parameters.name: git-ref
parameters.summary: Git ref to fetch. Defaults to main.

parameters.name: local
parameters.summary: Write the configuration into cwd so subsequent commands treat it as a local override.

parameters.name: log-level
parameters.summary: Minimum log level. Default: information

parameters.name: config-source
parameters.summary: Override the configuration source: local, remote

parameters.name: skip-private-repositories
parameters.summary: Skip cloning private repositories

namespaces.summary: Inspect and validate repository entries in the link registry.

commands.name: match
commands.summary: Check whether a repository at a specific branch or tag should be included in the next build.
commands.notes: Exits 0 if the repository matches; 1 otherwise. Useful for conditional CI steps.

parameters.name: repository
parameters.summary: Repository slug to match (e.g. elastic/elasticsearch).

parameters.name: branch-or-tag
parameters.summary: Branch name or version tag to test against.

parameters.name: log-level
parameters.summary: Minimum log level. Default: information

parameters.name: config-source
parameters.summary: Override the configuration source: local, remote

parameters.name: skip-private-repositories
parameters.summary: Skip cloning private repositories

commands.name: validate
commands.summary: Verify that every repository in the assembler configuration has an active published entry in the link registry.

parameters.name: log-level
parameters.summary: Minimum log level. Default: information

parameters.name: config-source
parameters.summary: Override the configuration source: local, remote

parameters.name: skip-private-repositories
parameters.summary: Skip cloning private repositories

namespaces.summary: Deploy built documentation to S3 and update CloudFront redirect rules.

commands.name: apply
commands.summary: Upload the changes described in a plan file to S3.
commands.notes: Run after assembler deploy plan. Applies the pre-computed diff to the S3 bucket.

parameters.name: environment
parameters.summary: Named deployment target.

parameters.name: s3-bucket-name
parameters.summary: S3 bucket to deploy to.

parameters.name: plan-file
parameters.summary: Path to the plan file produced by assembler deploy plan.

parameters.name: log-level
parameters.summary: Minimum log level. Default: information

parameters.name: config-source
parameters.summary: Override the configuration source: local, remote

parameters.name: skip-private-repositories
parameters.summary: Skip cloning private repositories

commands.name: plan
commands.summary: Compute a diff of what would change when deploying to S3 and write it to a plan file.
commands.notes:
Two-step deployment: plan computes the diff and writes a plan file; apply executes it.
Review the plan before applying to avoid accidental mass deletions.

parameters.name: environment
parameters.summary: Named deployment target.

parameters.name: s3-bucket-name
parameters.summary: S3 bucket to deploy to.

parameters.name: out
parameters.summary: Path to write the plan file. Defaults to stdout.

parameters.name: delete-threshold
parameters.summary: Abort if the plan would delete more than this percentage of objects (0–100).

parameters.name: log-level
parameters.summary: Minimum log level. Default: information

parameters.name: config-source
parameters.summary: Override the configuration source: local, remote

parameters.name: skip-private-repositories
parameters.summary: Skip cloning private repositories

commands.summary: Push the redirects mapping to CloudFront's KeyValueStore.
commands.notes: Run after assembler build produces a redirects.json.

parameters.name: redirects-file
parameters.summary: Path to redirects.json. Defaults to .artifacts/docs/redirects.json.

parameters.name: log-level
parameters.summary: Minimum log level. Default: information

parameters.name: config-source
parameters.summary: Override the configuration source: local, remote

parameters.name: skip-private-repositories
parameters.summary: Skip cloning private repositories

parameters.summary: Skip cloning private repositories

commands.name: validate-link-reference
commands.summary: Check that no link in a local links.json conflicts with a path prefix defined in navigation.yml.

parameters.summary: Path to links.json. Defaults to .artifacts/docs/html/links.json.

parameters.summary: Override the configuration source: local, remote

parameters.name: skip-private-repositories
parameters.summary: Skip cloning private repositories

namespaces.summary: Create, bundle, and publish changelog entries.

commands.name: add
commands.summary: Create a new changelog entry YAML file.

parameters.name: products
parameters.summary: Optional: Products affected in format "product target lifecycle, ..." (e.g., "elasticsearch 9.2.0 ga, cloud-serverless 2025-08-05"). If not specified, will be inferred from repository or config defaults.

parameters.name: action
parameters.summary: Optional: What users must do to mitigate

parameters.name: areas
parameters.summary: Optional: Area(s) affected (comma-separated or specify multiple times)

parameters.name: concise
parameters.summary: Optional: Omit schema reference comments from generated YAML files. Useful in CI to produce compact output.

parameters.name: config
parameters.summary: Optional: Path to the changelog.yml configuration file. Defaults to 'docs/changelog.yml'

parameters.name: description
parameters.summary: Optional: Additional information about the change (max 600 characters)

parameters.name: no-extract-release-notes
parameters.summary: Optional: Turn off extraction of release notes from PR descriptions. By default, release notes are extracted when using --prs. Matched release note text is used as the changelog description (only if --description is not explicitly provided). The changelog title comes from --title or the PR title, not from the release note section.

parameters.name: no-extract-issues
parameters.summary: Optional: Turn off extraction of linked references. When using --prs: turns off extraction of linked issues from the PR body (e.g., "Fixes #123"). When using --issues: turns off extraction of linked PRs from the issue body (e.g., "Fixed by #123"). By default, linked references are extracted in both cases.

parameters.name: feature-id
parameters.summary: Optional: Feature flag ID

parameters.name: highlight
parameters.summary: Optional: Include in release highlights

parameters.name: impact
parameters.summary: Optional: How the user's environment is affected

parameters.name: issues
parameters.summary: Optional: Issue URL(s) or number(s) (comma-separated), or a path to a newline-delimited file containing issue URLs or numbers. Can be specified multiple times. Each occurrence can be either comma-separated issues (e.g., `--issues "https://github.com/owner/repo/issues/123,456"`) or a file path (e.g., `--issues /path/to/file.txt`). If --owner and --repo are provided, issue numbers can be used instead of URLs. If specified, --title can be derived from the issue. Creates one changelog file per issue.

parameters.name: owner
parameters.summary: Optional: GitHub repository owner (used when --prs or --issues contains just numbers, or when using --release-version). Falls back to bundle.owner in changelog.yml when not specified. If that value is also absent, "elastic" is used.

parameters.name: output
parameters.summary: Optional: Output directory for the changelog. Falls back to bundle.directory in changelog.yml when not specified. Defaults to current directory.

parameters.name: prs
parameters.summary: Optional: Pull request URL(s) or PR number(s) (comma-separated), or a path to a newline-delimited file containing PR URLs or numbers. Can be specified multiple times. Each occurrence can be either comma-separated PRs (e.g., `--prs "https://github.com/owner/repo/pull/123,6789"`) or a file path (e.g., `--prs /path/to/file.txt`). When specifying PRs directly, provide comma-separated values. When specifying a file path, provide a single value that points to a newline-delimited file. If --owner and --repo are provided, PR numbers can be used instead of URLs. If specified, --title can be derived from the PR. If mappings are configured, --areas and --type can also be derived from the PR. Creates one changelog file per PR.

parameters.name: release-version
parameters.summary: Optional: GitHub release tag to fetch PRs from (e.g., "v9.2.0" or "latest"). When specified, creates one changelog per PR in the release notes. Requires --repo (or bundle.repo in changelog.yml). Mutually exclusive with --prs and --issues. Does not create a bundle; use 'changelog gh-release' for that.

parameters.name: repo
parameters.summary: Optional: GitHub repository name (used when --prs or --issues contains just numbers, or when using --release-version). Falls back to bundle.repo in changelog.yml when not specified.

parameters.name: strip-title-prefix
parameters.summary: Optional: When used with --prs, remove square brackets and text within them from the beginning of PR titles, and also remove a colon if it follows the closing bracket (e.g., "[Inference API] Title" becomes "Title", "[ES|QL]: Title" becomes "Title", "[Discover][ESQL] Title" becomes "Title")

parameters.name: subtype
parameters.summary: Optional: Subtype for breaking changes (api, behavioral, configuration, etc.)

parameters.name: title
parameters.summary: Optional: A short, user-facing title (max 80 characters). Required if neither --prs nor --issues is specified. If --prs and --title are specified, the latter value is used instead of what exists in the PR.

parameters.name: type
parameters.summary: Optional: Type of change (feature, enhancement, bug-fix, breaking-change, etc.). Required if neither --prs nor --issues is specified. If mappings are configured, type can be derived from the PR or issue.

parameters.name: use-pr-number
parameters.summary: Optional: Use PR numbers for filenames instead of timestamp-slug. With both --prs (which creates one changelog per specified PR) and --issues (which creates one changelog per specified issue), each changelog filename will be derived from its PR numbers. Requires --prs or --issues. Mutually exclusive with --use-issue-number.

parameters.name: use-issue-number
parameters.summary: Optional: Use issue numbers for filenames instead of timestamp-slug. With both --prs (which creates one changelog per specified PR) and --issues (which creates one changelog per specified issue), each changelog filename will be derived from its issues. Requires --prs or --issues. Mutually exclusive with --use-pr-number.

parameters.name: log-level
parameters.summary: Minimum log level. Default: information

parameters.name: config-source
parameters.summary: Override the configuration source: local, remote

parameters.name: skip-private-repositories
parameters.summary: Skip cloning private repositories

commands.name: bundle
commands.summary: Aggregate changelog entries matching a filter into a single bundle YAML.
commands.notes:
Accepts either a named profile from changelog.yml (e.g. bundle my-release 9.2.0) or
an explicit filter flag. Exactly one filter must be specified: --all, --input-products,
--prs, --issues, --release-version, or --report.

parameters.name: profile
parameters.summary: Optional: Profile name from bundle.profiles in config (for example, "elasticsearch-release"). When specified, the second argument is the version or promotion report URL.

parameters.name: profile-arg
parameters.summary: Optional: Version number or promotion report URL/path when using a profile (for example, "9.2.0" or "https://buildkite.../promotion-report.html")

parameters.name: profile-report
parameters.summary: Optional: Promotion report or URL list file when also providing a version. When provided, the second argument must be a version string and this is the PR/issue filter source (for example, "bundle serverless-release 2026-02 ./report.html").

parameters.name: all
parameters.summary: Include all changelogs in the directory.

parameters.name: config
parameters.summary: Optional: Path to the changelog.yml configuration file. Defaults to 'docs/changelog.yml'

parameters.name: directory
parameters.summary: Optional: Directory containing changelog YAML files. Uses config bundle.directory or defaults to current directory

parameters.name: description
parameters.summary: Optional: Bundle description text with placeholder support. Supports VERSION, LIFECYCLE, OWNER, and REPO placeholders. Overrides bundle.description from config. In option-based mode, placeholders require --output-products to be explicitly specified.

parameters.name: hide-features
parameters.summary: Optional: Filter by feature IDs (comma-separated) or a path to a newline-delimited file containing feature IDs. Can be specified multiple times. Entries with matching feature-id values will be commented out when the bundle is rendered (by CLI render or changelog directive).

parameters.name: no-release-date
parameters.summary: Optional: Skip auto-population of release date in the bundle. Mutually exclusive with --release-date. Not available in profile mode.

parameters.name: release-date
parameters.summary: Optional: Explicit release date for the bundle in YYYY-MM-DD format. Overrides auto-population behavior. Mutually exclusive with --no-release-date. Not available in profile mode.

parameters.name: input-products
parameters.summary: Filter by products in format "product target lifecycle, ..." (for example, "cloud-serverless 2025-12-02 ga, cloud-serverless 2025-12-06 beta"). When specified, all three parts (product, target, lifecycle) are required but can be wildcards (*). Examples: "elasticsearch * *" matches all elasticsearch changelogs, "cloud-serverless 2025-12-02 *" matches cloud-serverless 2025-12-02 with any lifecycle, "* 9.3.* *" matches any product with target starting with "9.3.", "* * *" matches all changelogs (equivalent to --all).

parameters.name: output
parameters.summary: Optional: Output path for the bundled changelog. Can be either (1) a directory path, in which case 'changelog-bundle.yaml' is created in that directory, or (2) a file path ending in .yml or .yaml. Uses config bundle.output_directory or defaults to 'changelog-bundle.yaml' in the input directory

parameters.name: output-products
parameters.summary: Optional: Explicitly set the products array in the output file in format "product target lifecycle, ...". Overrides any values from changelogs.

parameters.name: issues
parameters.summary: Filter by issue URLs (comma-separated), or a path to a newline-delimited file containing fully-qualified GitHub issue URLs. Can be specified multiple times.

parameters.name: owner
parameters.summary: GitHub repository owner, which is used when PRs or issues are specified as numbers or when using --release-version. Falls back to bundle.owner in changelog.yml when not specified. If that value is also absent, "elastic" is used.

parameters.name: plan
parameters.summary: Emit GitHub Actions step outputs (needs_network, needs_github_token, output_path) describing network requirements and the resolved output path, then exit without generating the bundle. Intended for CI actions.

parameters.name: prs
parameters.summary: Filter by pull request URLs (comma-separated), or a path to a newline-delimited file containing fully-qualified GitHub PR URLs. Can be specified multiple times.

parameters.name: release-version
parameters.summary: GitHub release tag to use as a filter source (for example, "v9.2.0" or "latest"). When specified, fetches the release, parses PR references from the release notes, and uses those PRs as the filter — equivalent to passing the PR list via --prs. When --output-products is not specified, it is inferred from the release tag and repository name.

parameters.name: repo
parameters.summary: GitHub repository name, which is used when PRs or issues are specified as numbers or when using --release-version. Falls back to bundle.repo in changelog.yml when not specified. If that value is also absent, the product ID is used.

parameters.name: report
parameters.summary: A URL or file path to a promotion report. Extracts PR URLs and uses them as the filter.

parameters.name: resolve
parameters.summary: Optional: Copy the contents of each changelog file into the entries array. Uses config bundle.resolve or defaults to false.

parameters.name: log-level
parameters.summary: Minimum log level. Default: information

parameters.name: config-source
parameters.summary: Override the configuration source: local, remote

parameters.name: skip-private-repositories
parameters.summary: Skip cloning private repositories

commands.name: bundle-amend
commands.summary: Append additional changelog entries to a published bundle without modifying it.
commands.notes: Creates an immutable .amend-N.yaml sidecar file alongside the original bundle.

parameters.name: bundle-path
parameters.summary: Required: Path to the original bundle file to amend

parameters.name: add
parameters.summary: Required: Path(s) to changelog YAML file(s) to add as comma-separated values (e.g., --add "file1.yaml,file2.yaml"). Supports tilde (~) expansion and relative paths.

parameters.name: resolve
parameters.summary: Optional: Copy the contents of each changelog file into the entries array. Use --no-resolve to explicitly turn off resolve (overrides inference from original bundle).

parameters.name: log-level
parameters.summary: Minimum log level. Default: information

parameters.name: config-source
parameters.summary: Override the configuration source: local, remote

parameters.name: skip-private-repositories
parameters.summary: Skip cloning private repositories

commands.name: evaluate-pr
commands.summary: (CI) Evaluate a pull request for changelog generation eligibility and set GitHub Actions outputs.
commands.notes:
Runs pre-flight checks (body-only edit, bot loop, manual edit), applies label rules from
changelog.yml, and resolves the entry type and title. Designed to be called from a
GitHub Actions workflow step.

parameters.name: config
parameters.summary: Path to the changelog.yml configuration file

parameters.name: owner
parameters.summary: GitHub repository owner

parameters.name: repo
parameters.summary: GitHub repository name

parameters.name: pr-number
parameters.summary: Pull request number

parameters.name: pr-title
parameters.summary: Pull request title

parameters.name: pr-labels
parameters.summary: Comma-separated PR labels

parameters.name: head-ref
parameters.summary: PR head branch ref

parameters.name: head-sha
parameters.summary: PR head commit SHA

parameters.name: event-action
parameters.summary: Optional: GitHub event action (e.g., opened, synchronize, edited). When omitted, body-only-edit and bot-loop checks are skipped.

parameters.name: title-changed
parameters.summary: Whether the PR title changed (for edited events)

parameters.name: body-changed
parameters.summary: Whether the PR body changed (for edited events)

parameters.name: strip-title-prefix
parameters.summary: Remove square-bracket prefixes from the PR title

parameters.name: bot-name
parameters.summary: Bot login name for loop detection

parameters.name: log-level
parameters.summary: Minimum log level. Default: information

parameters.name: config-source
parameters.summary: Override the configuration source: local, remote

parameters.name: skip-private-repositories
parameters.summary: Skip cloning private repositories

commands.name: gh-release
commands.summary: Create changelog entries from the PRs referenced in a GitHub release.

parameters.name: repo
parameters.summary: Required: GitHub repository in owner/repo format (e.g., "elastic/elasticsearch" or just "elasticsearch" which defaults to elastic/elasticsearch)

parameters.name: version
parameters.summary: Optional: Version tag to fetch (e.g., "v9.0.0", "9.0.0"). Defaults to "latest"

parameters.name: config
parameters.summary: Optional: Path to the changelog.yml configuration file. Defaults to 'docs/changelog.yml'

parameters.name: description
parameters.summary: Optional: Bundle description text with placeholder support. Supports VERSION, LIFECYCLE, OWNER, and REPO placeholders. Overrides bundle.description from config.

parameters.name: output
parameters.summary: Optional: Output directory for changelog files. Falls back to bundle.directory in changelog.yml when not specified. Defaults to './changelogs'

parameters.name: release-date
parameters.summary: Optional: Explicit release date for the bundle in YYYY-MM-DD format. Overrides GitHub release published date.

parameters.name: strip-title-prefix
parameters.summary: Optional: Remove square brackets and text within them from the beginning of PR titles (e.g., "[Inference API] Title" becomes "Title")

parameters.name: warn-on-type-mismatch
parameters.summary: Optional: Warn when the type inferred from release notes section headers doesn't match the type derived from PR labels. Defaults to true

parameters.name: log-level
parameters.summary: Minimum log level. Default: information

parameters.name: config-source
parameters.summary: Override the configuration source: local, remote

parameters.name: skip-private-repositories
parameters.summary: Skip cloning private repositories

commands.name: init
commands.summary: Create changelog.yml and the changelog/releases directory structure.
commands.notes:
Discovers the docs folder via docset.yml; falls back to creating PATH/docs.
When changelog.yml already exists, updates only the paths specified via  or .
Seeds bundle.owner, bundle.repo, and bundle.link_allow_repos from the git remote origin when available.

parameters.name: path
parameters.summary: Repository root. Defaults to cwd.

parameters.name: changelog-dir
parameters.summary: Changelog entry directory. Defaults to docs/changelog.

parameters.name: bundles-dir
parameters.summary: Bundle output directory. Defaults to docs/releases.

parameters.name: owner
parameters.summary: GitHub owner for seeding bundle defaults. Overrides the value inferred from git remote origin.

parameters.name: repo
parameters.summary: GitHub repository name for seeding bundle defaults. Overrides the value inferred from git remote origin.

parameters.name: log-level
parameters.summary: Minimum log level. Default: information

parameters.name: config-source
parameters.summary: Override the configuration source: local, remote

parameters.name: skip-private-repositories
parameters.summary: Skip cloning private repositories

commands.name: remove
commands.summary: Delete changelog entry files matching a filter.
commands.notes:
Blocks when a file is referenced by an unresolved bundle to avoid breaking the {changelog}
directive in published documentation. Pass --force to override.

parameters.name: profile
parameters.summary: Optional: Profile name from bundle.profiles in config (for example, "elasticsearch-release"). When specified, the second argument is the version or promotion report URL.

parameters.name: profile-arg
parameters.summary: Optional: Version number or promotion report URL/path when using a profile (for example, "9.2.0" or "https://buildkite.../promotion-report.html")

parameters.name: profile-report
parameters.summary: Optional: Promotion report or URL list file when also providing a version. When provided, the second argument must be a version string and this is the PR/issue filter source.

parameters.name: all
parameters.summary: Remove all changelogs in the directory. Exactly one filter option must be specified: --all, --products, --prs, --issues, or --report.

parameters.name: bundles-dir
parameters.summary: Optional: Override the directory that is scanned for bundles during the dependency check. Auto-discovered from config or fallback paths when not specified.

parameters.name: config
parameters.summary: Optional: Path to the changelog.yml configuration file. Defaults to 'docs/changelog.yml'

parameters.name: directory
parameters.summary: Optional: Directory containing changelog YAML files. Uses config bundle.directory or defaults to current directory

parameters.name: dry-run
parameters.summary: Print the files that would be removed without deleting them. Valid in both profile and raw mode.

parameters.name: force
parameters.summary: Proceed with removal even when files are referenced by unresolved bundles. Emits warnings instead of errors for each dependency. Valid in both profile and raw mode.

parameters.name: issues
parameters.summary: Filter by issue URLs (comma-separated) or a path to a newline-delimited file containing fully-qualified GitHub issue URLs. Can be specified multiple times.

parameters.name: owner
parameters.summary: Optional: GitHub repository owner, which is used when PRs or issues are specified as numbers or when using --release-version. Falls back to bundle.owner in changelog.yml when not specified. If that value is also absent, "elastic" is used.

parameters.name: products
parameters.summary: Filter by products in format "product target lifecycle, ..." (for example, "elasticsearch 9.3.0 ga"). All three parts are required but can be wildcards (*).

parameters.name: prs
parameters.summary: Filter by pull request URLs (comma-separated) or a path to a newline-delimited file containing fully-qualified GitHub PR URLs. Can be specified multiple times.

parameters.name: release-version
parameters.summary: GitHub release tag to use as a filter source (for example, "v9.2.0" or "latest"). Fetches the release, parses PR references from the release notes, and removes changelogs whose PR URLs match — equivalent to passing the PR list using --prs.

parameters.name: repo
parameters.summary: GitHub repository name, which is used when PRs or issues are specified as numbers or when --release-version is used. Falls back to bundle.repo in changelog.yml when not specified. If that value is also absent, the product ID is used.

parameters.name: report
parameters.summary: Optional (option-based mode only): URL or file path to a promotion report. Extracts PR URLs and uses them as the filter. Mutually exclusive with --all, --products, --prs, and --issues.

parameters.name: log-level
parameters.summary: Minimum log level. Default: information

parameters.name: config-source
parameters.summary: Override the configuration source: local, remote

parameters.name: skip-private-repositories
parameters.summary: Skip cloning private repositories

commands.name: render
commands.summary: Render one or more changelog bundles to Markdown or AsciiDoc.

parameters.name: input
parameters.summary: Required: Bundle input(s) in format "bundle-file-path|changelog-file-path|repo|link-visibility" (use pipe as delimiter). To merge multiple bundles, separate them with commas. Only bundle-file-path is required. link-visibility can be "hide-links" or "keep-links" (default). Use "hide-links" for private repositories; when set, all PR and issue links for each affected entry are hidden (entries may have multiple links via the prs and issues arrays). Paths support tilde (~) expansion and relative paths.

parameters.name: config
parameters.summary: Optional: Path to the changelog.yml configuration file. Defaults to 'docs/changelog.yml'

parameters.name: file-type
parameters.summary: Optional: Output file type. Valid values: "markdown" or "asciidoc". Defaults to "markdown"

parameters.name: hide-features
parameters.summary: Filter by feature IDs (comma-separated), or a path to a newline-delimited file containing feature IDs. Can be specified multiple times. Entries with matching feature-id values will be commented out in the output.

parameters.name: output
parameters.summary: Optional: Output directory for rendered files. Defaults to current directory

parameters.name: subsections
parameters.summary: Optional: Group entries by area/component in subsections. For breaking changes with a subtype, groups by subtype instead of area. Defaults to false

parameters.name: title
parameters.summary: Optional: Title to use for section headers in output files. Defaults to version from first bundle

parameters.name: log-level
parameters.summary: Minimum log level. Default: information

parameters.name: config-source
parameters.summary: Override the configuration source: local, remote

parameters.name: skip-private-repositories
parameters.summary: Skip cloning private repositories

commands.name: upload
commands.summary: Upload changelog entries or bundle artifacts to S3 or Elasticsearch.
commands.notes: Uses content-hash–based incremental transfer — only changed files are uploaded.

parameters.name: artifact-type
parameters.summary: Artifact type to upload: 'changelog' (individual entries) or 'bundle' (consolidated bundles).

parameters.name: target
parameters.summary: Upload destination: 's3' or 'elasticsearch'.

parameters.name: s3-bucket-name
parameters.summary: S3 bucket name (required when target is 's3').

parameters.name: config
parameters.summary: Path to changelog.yml configuration file. Defaults to docs/changelog.yml.

parameters.name: directory
parameters.summary: Override changelog directory instead of reading it from config.

parameters.name: log-level
parameters.summary: Minimum log level. Default: information

parameters.name: config-source
parameters.summary: Override the configuration source: local, remote

parameters.name: skip-private-repositories
parameters.summary: Skip cloning private repositories

namespaces.summary: Build a documentation portal over multiple independent documentation sets, each with its own navigation.

defaultCommand.summary: Clone all repositories and build the portal in one step.

parameters.name: config
parameters.summary: Path to the codex.yml configuration file.

parameters.name: strict
parameters.summary: Treat warnings as errors.

parameters.name: fetch-latest
parameters.summary: Fetch the HEAD of each branch instead of the pinned ref.

parameters.name: assume-cloned
parameters.summary: Skip cloning; assume repositories are already on disk.

parameters.name: output
parameters.summary: Output directory for the built portal. Defaults to .artifacts/codex/.

parameters.name: serve
parameters.summary: Serve the portal on port 4000 after a successful build.

parameters.name: log-level
parameters.summary: Minimum log level. Default: information

parameters.name: config-source
parameters.summary: Override the configuration source: local, remote

parameters.name: skip-private-repositories
parameters.summary: Skip cloning private repositories

commands.name: build
commands.summary: Build the portal from previously cloned repositories.
commands.notes: Run after codex clone.

parameters.name: config
parameters.summary: Path to the codex.yml configuration file.

parameters.name: strict
parameters.summary: Treat warnings as errors.

parameters.name: output
parameters.summary: Output directory. Defaults to .artifacts/codex/.

parameters.name: log-level
parameters.summary: Minimum log level. Default: information

parameters.name: config-source
parameters.summary: Override the configuration source: local, remote

parameters.name: skip-private-repositories
parameters.summary: Skip cloning private repositories

commands.name: clone
commands.summary: Clone all repositories listed in the codex configuration.

parameters.name: config
parameters.summary: Path to the codex.yml configuration file.

parameters.name: strict
parameters.summary: Treat warnings as errors.

parameters.name: fetch-latest
parameters.summary: Fetch the HEAD of each branch instead of the pinned ref.

parameters.name: assume-cloned
parameters.summary: Skip cloning; assume repositories are already on disk.

parameters.name: log-level
parameters.summary: Minimum log level. Default: information

parameters.name: config-source
parameters.summary: Override the configuration source: local, remote

parameters.name: skip-private-repositories
parameters.summary: Skip cloning private repositories

commands.name: index
commands.summary: Index the built portal documentation into Elasticsearch.
commands.notes: Run after codex build. Streams documents from all included documentation sets to the cluster.

parameters.name: config
parameters.summary: Path to the codex.yml configuration file.

parameters.name: endpoint
parameters.summary: -es,--endpoint, Elasticsearch endpoint URL. Falls back to env DOCUMENTATION_ELASTIC_URL.

parameters.name: api-key
parameters.summary: API key for authentication. Falls back to env DOCUMENTATION_ELASTIC_APIKEY.

parameters.name: username
parameters.summary: Username for basic authentication. Falls back to env DOCUMENTATION_ELASTIC_USERNAME.

parameters.name: password
parameters.summary: Password for basic authentication. Falls back to env DOCUMENTATION_ELASTIC_PASSWORD.

parameters.name: ai-enrichment
parameters.summary: Enable AI enrichment of documents using LLM-generated metadata (enabled by default).

parameters.name: search-num-threads
parameters.summary: Number of search threads for the inference endpoint.

parameters.name: index-num-threads
parameters.summary: Number of index threads for the inference endpoint.

parameters.name: eis
parameters.summary: Use the Elastic Inference Service to bootstrap the inference endpoint (enabled by default).

parameters.name: bootstrap-timeout
parameters.summary: How long to wait for the inference endpoint to become ready (e.g. 4m, 90s).

parameters.name: force-reindex
parameters.summary: Force a full reindex, discarding any incremental state.

parameters.name: buffer-size
parameters.summary: Number of documents per bulk request.

parameters.name: max-retries
parameters.summary: Number of retry attempts for failed bulk items.

parameters.name: debug-mode
parameters.summary: Log every Elasticsearch request and response body; append ?pretty to all requests.

parameters.name: proxy-address
parameters.summary: Route requests through this proxy URL.

parameters.name: proxy-username
parameters.summary: Proxy server username.

parameters.name: proxy-password
parameters.summary: Proxy server password.

parameters.name: disable-ssl-verification
parameters.summary: Disable SSL certificate validation. Use only in controlled environments.

parameters.name: certificate-fingerprint
parameters.summary: SHA-256 fingerprint of a self-signed server certificate.

parameters.name: certificate-path
parameters.summary: Path to a PEM or DER certificate file for SSL validation.

parameters.name: certificate-not-root
parameters.summary: Set when the certificate is an intermediate CA rather than the root.

parameters.name: log-level
parameters.summary: Minimum log level. Default: information

parameters.name: config-source
parameters.summary: Override the configuration source: local, remote

parameters.name: skip-private-repositories
parameters.summary: Skip cloning private repositories

commands.name: serve
commands.summary: Serve the built portal at http://localhost:4000.
commands.notes: Run after codex build. Does not rebuild on file changes.

parameters.name: port
parameters.summary: Port to listen on. Default: 4000.

parameters.name: path
parameters.summary: Path to the portal output. Defaults to .artifacts/codex/docs/.

parameters.name: log-level
parameters.summary: Minimum log level. Default: information

parameters.name: config-source
parameters.summary: Override the configuration source: local, remote

parameters.name: skip-private-repositories
parameters.summary: Skip cloning private repositories

commands.name: update-redirects
commands.summary: Push the codex redirects mapping to CloudFront's KeyValueStore.
commands.notes: Run after codex build produces a redirects.json.

parameters.name: config
parameters.summary: Path to the codex.yml configuration file (used to resolve the environment).

parameters.name: environment
parameters.summary: Named deployment target. Defaults to the value in codex.yml or the ENVIRONMENT env var.

parameters.name: redirects-file
parameters.summary: Path to redirects.json. Defaults to .artifacts/codex/docs/redirects.json.

parameters.name: log-level
parameters.summary: Minimum log level. Default: information

parameters.name: config-source
parameters.summary: Override the configuration source: local, remote

parameters.name: skip-private-repositories
parameters.summary: Skip cloning private repositories

namespaces.summary: Validate cross-doc-set links against the published link registry.
namespaces.notes:
Every documentation set publishes a links.json file containing the URLs of all its pages.
These files are aggregated into a shared link registry. Inbound-links commands validate that
cross-links between documentation sets resolve to real pages in the registry.

commands.name: validate
commands.summary: Validate all cross-links originating from or targeting a specific repository.

parameters.name: from
parameters.summary: Only check links published by this repository slug.

parameters.name: to
parameters.summary: Only check links that point to this repository slug.

parameters.name: log-level
parameters.summary: Minimum log level. Default: information

parameters.name: config-source
parameters.summary: Override the configuration source: local, remote

parameters.name: skip-private-repositories
parameters.summary: Skip cloning private repositories

commands.name: validate-all
commands.summary: Validate all cross-links across every published links.json in the registry.

parameters.name: log-level
parameters.summary: Minimum log level. Default: information

parameters.name: config-source
parameters.summary: Override the configuration source: local, remote

parameters.name: skip-private-repositories
parameters.summary: Skip cloning private repositories

commands.name: validate-link-reference
commands.summary: Validate a locally built links.json against the published link registry.
commands.notes:
Use this to verify cross-links before publishing. The local links.json is checked against
all currently published registries to ensure every outbound cross-link resolves.

parameters.name: file
parameters.summary: Path to links.json. Defaults to .artifacts/docs/html/links.json.

parameters.name: path
parameters.summary: Root of the documentation source. Defaults to cwd.

parameters.name: log-level
parameters.summary: Minimum log level. Default: information

parameters.name: config-source
parameters.summary: Override the configuration source: local, remote

parameters.name: skip-private-repositories
parameters.summary: Skip cloning private repositories
